SEARCH

Package org.sim

package org.sim
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    org.sim.fish
     
    org.sim.food
     
  • Class
    Description
    Biome
    Represents a horizontal water depth zone (layer) with specific environmental parameters.
    Consts
    Configuration class that stores all global constants, configuration balance parameters, and base numbers for the simulation engine.
    Entity
    Represents the base class for all moving and non-moving objects in the simulation world.
    IProfilable
    Interface implemented by objects that can generate a text description list of their internal states.
    Processing
    Main graphical engine of the application based on the Processing library.
    RND
    Static utility class providing convenient helper methods for random number generation.
    SimDataMonitor
    Collects population statistics and genetic averages during the simulation.
    SimManager
    Main manager class that controls the core simulation loop.
    State<T,E>
    Abstract template class for implementing state behaviors in the Finite State Machine (FSM).
